_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: we found that PD168393 inhibited the baseline migration of unstimulated MPNST cells in a concentration-dependent manner (Fig. 8 B).
details: Decreased baseline migration of unstimulated MPNST cells in a concentration-dependent manner at 1-1000 nM
